name: Tabitha
description:
An average sized woman with large, pointed, and fluffy bat-like ears atop her head and long, unkempt black hair that covers up most of her face, concealing it except for the occasional glimpse you get to reveal her large and innocent silver eyes, her shy, fang accented smile, and her surprisingly long tongue.

Instead of arms, she has large, black bat-like wings that end in long clawed hands with a few large tufts of fluff bridging the gap between them and her shoulders, which become more prominent whenever she folds her wings to hold her arms closer to her body.

Her soft looking C cup tits are hidden behind an incredibly tight black fabric that does nothing to conceal her trim midriff, and even manages to emphasize her curves instead of hide them. Along the sides of her torso all the way down to her waist, the webbing of her wings sprouts from her skin, and it ends just before her surprisingly wide, womanly hips that sway her plump ass temptingly with each and every step she takes. She’s wearing a tight black skirt that’s just barely long enough to cover her groin, but it doesn’t manage to conceal her ample rear and wide hips on the sides and back, allowing you to easily see the underside of her plump, jiggly butt and her pink silky thong from every angle except from directly in front of her.

Her thighs are bare at the very top of them, but almost immediately afterward they’re covered in bat-like fur that trail all the way down from her upper thighs to her large and dexterous looking clawed feet, giving the impression that she’s wearing black thigh-highs despite there being no clothing there at all.
